A

addEdge(Node) - Method in class configs.Node
Adds an outgoing edge to another node when the target is not null.
addPublisher(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
Registers a publisher for this topic.
addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Adds a servlet to handle requests that match the given HTTP command and URI prefix.
addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
Registers a servlet for the given HTTP command and URI prefix.
Agent - Interface in graph
Represents a participant in the publish-subscribe system that can listen to and publish messages.
asDouble - Variable in class graph.Message
The text representation of the message.
asText - Variable in class graph.Message
The UTF-8 encoded message body.

C

callback(String, Message) - Method in interface graph.Agent
Receives a topic callback with the published message.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.IncAgent
Increments numeric messages from the subscribed topic and republishes them.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.MinAgent
Subtracts the second input from the first and republishes the result.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.MulAgent
Multiplies the two input values and republishes the result.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
Enqueues a callback for asynchronous processing.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.PlusAgent
Adds the two input values and republishes the result.
clear() - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Removes all topics from the manager.
close() - Method in interface configs.Config
Releases resources associated with the configuration.
close() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
 
close() - Method in interface graph.Agent
Releases resources and unsubscribes the agent.
close() - Method in class graph.IncAgent
Unsubscribes the agent from its topics.
close() - Method in class graph.MinAgent
Unsubscribes the agent from its topics.
close() - Method in class graph.MulAgent
Unsubscribes the agent from its topics.
close() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
Stops the worker thread and closes the wrapped agent.
close() - Method in class graph.PlusAgent
Unsubscribes the agent from its topics.
close() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Closes the server and releases its resources.
close() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
Stops the server, closes the socket, and shuts down all registered servlets.
close() - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
Closes the current configuration, if one has been loaded.
close() - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
No-op close hook for the static file servlet.
close() - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
Closes resources used by the servlet.
close() - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
No-op close hook for the topic display servlet.
Config - Interface in configs
Common configuration lifecycle contract for loading, identifying, and closing a config.
configs - package configs
 
ConfigValidator - Class in configs
Validates configuration text before it is loaded by GenericConfig.
ConfLoader - Class in servlets
Loads computational graph configurations from uploaded files, creates topics and agents, and returns an HTML visualization.
ConfLoader() - Constructor for class servlets.ConfLoader
Creates a configuration-loading servlet.
create() - Method in interface configs.Config
Creates or loads the configuration content.
create() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
Reads the config file and dynamically creates agent instances using reflection.
createFromTopics() - Method in class configs.Graph
Rebuilds the graph from the topics currently registered in the topic manager.

D

data - Variable in class graph.Message
The raw UTF-8 byte representation of the message.
date - Variable in class graph.Message
The numeric representation of the message when parseable.

G

GenericConfig - Class in configs
Loads computational graph configurations from files using reflection.
GenericConfig() - Constructor for class configs.GenericConfig
Creates an empty configuration loader.
get() - Static method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton
Returns the singleton topic manager.
getContent() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the request body bytes.
getEdges() - Method in class configs.Node
Returns the outgoing edges.
getGraphHTML(Graph) - Static method in class views.HtmlGraphWriter
Builds the full HTML document used to visualize the computational graph.
getHttpCommand() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the HTTP command.
getLastMessage() - Method in class graph.Topic
Returns the last published message.
getMessage() - Method in class configs.Node
Returns the node message, if one is set.
getName() - Method in interface configs.Config
Returns the configuration name.
getName() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
 
getName() - Method in class configs.Node
Returns the node name.
getName() - Method in interface graph.Agent
Returns the agent name.
getName() - Method in class graph.IncAgent
Returns the agent name.
getName() - Method in class graph.MinAgent
Returns the agent name.
getName() - Method in class graph.MulAgent
Returns the agent name.
getName() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
Returns the wrapped agent name.
getName() - Method in class graph.PlusAgent
Returns the agent name.
getParameters() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the parsed parameters.
getPubs() - Method in class graph.Topic
Returns the publishers for this topic.
getSubs() - Method in class graph.Topic
Returns the subscribers for this topic.
getTopic(String) - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Returns the topic with the given name, creating it if needed.
getTopics() - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Returns all known topics.
getUri() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the raw URI.
getUriSegments() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the URI path segments.
getVersion() - Method in interface configs.Config
Returns the configuration version.
getVersion() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
 
graph - package graph
 
Graph - Class in configs
Represents a computational graph as a collection of nodes and edges.
Graph() - Constructor for class configs.Graph
Creates an empty graph.

H

handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
Handles an uploaded configuration file, loads the graph, and returns its HTML view.
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
Serves a static file response for the requested URI.
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
Handles an HTTP request.
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
Publishes the requested message and renders the current topic values as HTML.
hasCycles() - Method in class configs.Graph
Checks whether any node in the graph participates in a cycle.
hasCycles() - Method in class configs.Node
Detects whether this node reaches itself through its outgoing edges.
HtmlGraphWriter - Class in views
Creates an HTML/SVG visualization for a computational graph.
HtmlLoader - Class in servlets
Serves static files (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) from a specified directory.
HtmlLoader(String) - Constructor for class servlets.HtmlLoader
Creates a static file servlet rooted at the given folder.
HTTPServer - Interface in server
HTTP server interface for handling web requests.

I

IncAgent - Class in graph
An agent that increments a numeric topic value by one.
IncAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class graph.IncAgent
Creates an increment agent that subscribes to one topic and publishes to one topic.
isValid(String) - Static method in class configs.ConfigValidator
Checks if the given configuration text can be loaded as a valid config.

M

Message - Class in graph
An immutable message object that can hold data as bytes, text, or numeric values.
Message(byte[]) - Constructor for class graph.Message
Creates a message from UTF-8 encoded bytes.
Message(double) - Constructor for class graph.Message
Creates a message from a numeric value.
Message(String) - Constructor for class graph.Message
Creates a message from text and derives the byte and numeric views.
MinAgent - Class in graph
An agent that subtracts the second numeric topic value from the first one.
MinAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class graph.MinAgent
Creates a subtraction agent that consumes two topics and publishes one result.
MulAgent - Class in graph
An agent that multiplies two numeric topic values and publishes the result.
MulAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class graph.MulAgent
Creates a multiplication agent that consumes two topics and publishes one result.
MyHTTPServer - Class in server
Multi-threaded HTTP server implementation using a thread pool.
MyHTTPServer(int, int) - Constructor for class server.MyHTTPServer
Creates a server bound to the given port and backed by a fixed thread pool.

N

name - Variable in class graph.Topic
The topic name.
Node - Class in configs
A graph node that represents either a topic or an agent and stores outgoing edges.
Node(String) - Constructor for class configs.Node
Creates a node with the given name.

P

ParallelAgent - Class in graph
Wraps an agent to handle callbacks asynchronously in a separate worker thread.
ParallelAgent(Agent, int) - Constructor for class graph.ParallelAgent
Wraps an agent in a worker-thread queue.
parseRequest(BufferedReader) - Static method in class server.RequestParser
Parses a raw HTTP request into a structured request object.
PlusAgent - Class in graph
An agent that adds two numeric topic values and publishes the result.
PlusAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class graph.PlusAgent
Creates an addition agent that consumes two topics and publishes one result.
publish(Message) - Method in class graph.Topic
Stores the latest message and notifies all subscribers.

R

removePublisher(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
Removes a publisher from this topic.
removeServlet(String, String) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Removes a servlet from the server.
removeServlet(String, String) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
Removes a servlet registration for the given HTTP command and URI prefix.
RequestInfo(String, String, String[], Map<String, String>, byte[]) - Constructor for class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Creates a parsed request record.
RequestParser - Class in server
Parses HTTP requests from raw input streams.
RequestParser.RequestInfo - Class in server
Contains parsed information from an HTTP request (method, URI, parameters, headers, body).
reset() - Method in interface graph.Agent
Resets the agent state between runs.
reset() - Method in class graph.IncAgent
Resets the agent state.
reset() - Method in class graph.MinAgent
Resets the stored input values.
reset() - Method in class graph.MulAgent
Resets the stored input values.
reset() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
Resets the wrapped agent.
reset() - Method in class graph.PlusAgent
Resets the stored input values.
run() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
Accepts client connections and dispatches requests to the worker pool.

server - package server
 
Servlet - Interface in servlets
Interface for handling HTTP requests and writing responses.
servlets - package servlets
 
setConfFile(String) - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
Sets the configuration file path to load.
setEdges(List<Node>) - Method in class configs.Node
Replaces the outgoing edge list.
setMessage(Message) - Method in class configs.Node
Stores the message currently associated with this node.
setName(String) - Method in class configs.Node
Updates the node name.
start() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Starts the server thread.
subscribe(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
Registers a subscriber for this topic.

T

Topic - Class in graph
Represents a communication channel in the publish-subscribe system.
TopicDisplayer - Class in servlets
Web interface for the publish-subscribe system.
TopicDisplayer() - Constructor for class servlets.TopicDisplayer
Creates the topic display servlet.
TopicManagerSingleton - Class in graph
Thread-safe singleton providing access to the central topic manager.
TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager - Class in graph
The actual topic manager that holds all topics.

U

unsubscribe(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
Removes a subscriber from this topic.
